textByHash.ffc86e2ae8bd6fc795080c9ae88f77ddb054efcc: Hello there, what can I do for you?
textByHash.bedc82a1db578c770ac5f19577aecc4396949432: What do you wish to know?
textByHash.d75c0ae602cddd6ea41bebb66ca91d07a99f379c: I'm afraid I don't have any information on that expedition. You're probably better off talking to one of the others.
textByHash.5777e4776e5ea83336432a2b9b42d4804a32b886: I could tell you about the King's work on the Tower of Magic though.
textByHash.9a97cb82f87174483f4242e444983e34b4074da9: During the time of King Shayzien VII, the Tower of Magic was the seat of power in Kourend. The King spent a lot of his time at the Tower, more than any other ruler.
textByHash.6734bc5ddfbcb3f9a3255d8b2b79208e2a4d0535: In fact, he oversaw the construction of various new sections, most notably the prison.
textByHash.8c78a5b8736e3d830fba8636b8662f84d635c047: Well now that I think about it, it was around the same time as the expedition you were asking about. That said, I doubt the two are connected.
textByHash.92849b09e3eed49a9eefc6c104e3e0531d89d826: Well the prison is abandoned and has been for many years, so I suppose there's no harm in letting you see it.
textByHash.c56413e72927432f622384c7c66cb530964d5c37: Be aware that the magic in that part of the tower is a bit unstable, so any items left in the prison will be lost. Would you like me to teleport you there now?
textByHash.ae96cd3e9d373144ee8a70aa6107a39c1fc1ae78: I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.bd5ef15bc4c02d6f82475f48fe968aec9943b0f2: Well, I am somewhat of an expert in the field of magical traps.
textByHash.db78cf243343098adcd17be4f4c3dec372091de1: A good question. The Archive is actually part of the Tower of Magic, and was repurposed many decades ago.
textByHash.0765e7b09d03e0e40a4c4875fc76f6e4445f863a: Unfortunately, we don't possess full understanding of the Tower of Magic and its many enchantments, so we often discover remnants of traps.
textByHash.e52919eb91193ee65aa03f9167e5a651d18fe69b: The task has fallen to me to investigate and study what we can of these enchantments in the hopes of understanding their magical power.
textByHash.a719686635a9f6439332874cfbbba5e3ee59f792: The Tower of Magic is a uniquely enchanted building located just west of the library, though many levels and rooms are hidden from sight.
textByHash.0b6ea753ec59fe20d2c7d7066b1ccc773de04d85: I have dedicated my life to studying the powerful enchantments that conceal the many levels of the Tower, though it proves difficult at times.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.fc5d4f5069edc9a5d4784310c3256744ab6bb8da: The Tower was constructed by King Rada III. We don't know exactly when, since dates were not recorded before the Twill Accord.
textByHash.b8a8f26dc44c071669aec894a5cbd2893ad03309: Following the rebellion of the five houses against King Rada III, the Council of Elders was formed. They used the Tower as a meeting place for the Council.
textByHash.73f1bbc658400e318beb7f4e445fd0220832fa4e: Since then, it has mostly been used as a residence by the various rulers of the kingdom, with each ruler using the Tower however they saw fit.
textByHash.6b0dcfeae7a5fab18c6798775f194a34f6396a9b: Eventually, after Kourend Castle was built, ownership of the Tower was passed over to Lord Arceuus.
textByHash.bfcbac33b4752c9382fbd8a5a48aec148f350a70: Indeed. During the invasion of the Wintertodt, it was feared that all of Kourend might be lost to the cold. In order to preserve the history of the kingdom, this archive was created during the fifth decade.
textByHash.0019537e9d5f3fa740404244e34e1fb3cda5d630: Unfortunately, as it is a former chamber of the Tower, and we do not fully understand the magic that conceals it, we often discover strange enchantments that we believe to be old traps.
textByHash.6e3d2e9832eb6dbea66cf8102c56b65c1f2af0b3: Just recently we lost a scholar when she accidentally activated a portal and fell through it.
textByHash.9665b6fb406015708ae0dc4f625de0975f7bec2f: Yes, she turned up a few days later, a little confused but physically fine. It happens every now and then, but most people turn up eventually.
textByHash.6f07d47efa5d90d7114324ab542977c8b41a59b1: Just be cautious of walking into walls. Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.d6a71e0d237b9f158bec1d5ad7a369895af2e621: I could tell you about the kings' work on the Tower of Magic though.
textByHash.71c26b8416338020a6b02f9be4b35cce7842b94c: During the time of King Shayzien VII, the Tower of Magic was the seat of power in Kourend. The king spent a lot of his time at the Tower, more than any other king.
textByHash.3012825f666d91ccfd3e339216298ddc2199e9a3: Well now that I think about it, it was around the same time as the expedition you were asking about. I doubt the two are connected though.
textByHash.7462baaf90798c59d9c8ac0e94d28a70cbf8eb46: Well the prison is abandoned and has been for many years so I suppose there's no harm in letting you see it.
textByHash.c2f7bbeedb67e63bfa9f0124c31941fd4136c790: Be aware that the magic in that part of the tower is a bit unstable so any items left in the prison will be lost. Would you like me to teleport you there now?
